items.summary: Implement real order placement on icDex: wire the backend grid trading logic to actually submit buy and sell limit orders to the icDex DEX canister for the ICP/ckUSDT pair, replacing any stub or simulated order logic.

Implement real order cancellation on icDex: before placing a new grid of orders on each interval tick, cancel all previously placed open orders via the icDex canister so stale orders do not accumulate.
Fetch the live mid price from the icDex ICP/ckUSDT order book canister instead of using a placeholder or hardcoded value, so grid prices are anchored to the real market.

Add a pre-flight balance check: before placing orders, query the user's ICP and ckUSDT token balances on-chain and verify they are sufficient to cover the configured grid. Display the available balances in the dashboard.

Add a transaction/order history log: persist a list of all orders placed and cancelled by the bot (timestamp, side, price, quantity, status) in stable storage and expose it via a query endpoint. Display this log in a new Trade History panel on the frontend.
